scripts.test: vitest run test/frontend/accounting_rules.test.ts test/frontend/money.test.ts test/frontend/idempotency.test.ts test/frontend/vehicle.test.ts
scripts.test:accounting: cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib test_installment_profit_never_exceeds_full_profit && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib test_instructions_section_22_cash_sale_no_double_count && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib test_unreceived_agency_defers_profit_and_cash_until_received
scripts.test:delivery: python3 scripts/check_numeric_write_identity.py && python3 scripts/check_exact_money_sql.py && python3 scripts/check_no_hard_financial_deletes.py && npm run test:accounting && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib test_v49_accounting_references_are_numeric && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib test_car_expenses_are_scoped_by_immutable_car_id && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib test_agency_duplicate_guard_uses_subsecond_operation_time && npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test:full: npm run test:delivery && npm run test:e2e
